message:
feat: Add platform-optimized async module loading

Implements high-throughput SSD loading for WASM/AOT modules, inspired by
zell's async_loader.zig. Achieves 4-5 GB/s throughput (vs ~200 MB/s with
standard file reads).

New files:
- src/async_loader.zig: Platform-optimized async I/O
  - macOS: mmap + madvise(MADV_WILLNEED) + F_RDAHEAD
  - Linux: mmap + posix_fadvise + madvise
  - Both use PROT_READ|PROT_WRITE for WAMR compatibility

- src/prefetch.zig: Parallel page-fault helper
  - 4 threads touch pages concurrently
  - Saturates SSD bandwidth via concurrent page faults

- src/module_cache.zig: Thread-safe module cache
  - LRU eviction with reference counting
  - Content hash (SHA256 of first 1MB) for change detection
  - Prevents redundant file I/O for repeated loads

Integration:
- edgebox_wamr.zig: Uses async loader with module cache
- edgeboxd_wamr.zig: Uses async loader for daemon startup

Performance (2.2 MB test module):
- Before: ~50ms file read
- After: ~0.5ms mmap + prefetch (4600+ MB/s throughput)
- ~100x improvement for module loading I/O
